I want a cold coffee because the weather is incredibly hot today.
Please pass me the white sugar if the espresso tastes too bitter.
The barista dropped my ceramic mug on the hard floor.
I missed my breakfast because I woke up very late this morning.
You will get a discount if you bring your own clean cup.
The manager changed the morning work schedule three times this week.
I prefer oat milk because dairy products upset my stomach.
Call my phone number if you cannot find the cafe entrance.
The server brought the wrong pastry to our outdoor table.
I cannot drink hot tea because my tongue is badly burnt.
You must show your receipt if you want a cash refund.
The delivery driver hit the bakery sign with his van.
We sat near the open window because the indoor fan was completely broken.
The internet connection will disconnect if you move outside the cafe.
The baker burned the fresh chocolate croissants this morning.
I need to see a doctor immediately because my chest hurts badly.
Please ring the emergency bell if the patient feels dizzy.
The nurse placed the clear medicine bottle on the small table.
The surgeon postponed the knee operation because the laboratory results were delayed.
You must sign the authorization papers if you want your medical records.
The ambulance damaged the metal hospital gates during the storm.
I cannot take this large pill because my throat feels very dry.
The doctor will change your treatment plan if the fever does not drop.
The clinic technician lost my blood sample yesterday morning.
The patient refused the medical injection because she has a phobia of needles.
Please go to room number four if you need a vision test.
The medical assistant broke the glass thermometer on the desk.
We wore protective face masks because the clinic air was full of dust.
The pharmacist will reject the paper order if the doctor's signature is missing.
The dentist cleaned my teeth very quickly this afternoon.
I cannot print my airline boarding pass because the digital kiosk is broken.
You must pay an extra fee if your luggage weighs over twenty kilograms.
Security officers confiscated my metal water bottle at the security checkpoint.
The family missed their vacation flight because the airport highway traffic was locked.
The airline gate agent will check your passport if you travel internationally.
The heavy ground vehicle scratched the airplane engine on the runway tarmac.
I bought an expensive neck pillow because the economy airplane seat is uncomfortable.
The flight will be delayed if a severe winter blizzard strikes the city.
The baggage handler dropped my fragile camera bag from the tall cargo ramp.
We went to the quiet airport lounge because the public boarding gate was chaotic.
The border officer will detain the traveler if the entry visa is expired.
The automated scanning machine tore my paper boarding ticket into two pieces.
I cannot eat the provided airline lunch because the food contains dairy.
The flight captain will abort the takeoff if the dashboard display warns of wind shear.
The terminal cleaning crew found my lost leather wallet under the seat.
I returned the winter jacket because the stitching was tearing open.
You can get a free gift if you spend over fifty dollars.
The clumsy shopper smashed a crystal perfume bottle on the shelf.
I prefer shopping online because the retail mall lines are too long.
The shop cashier will accept your coupon if it is valid.
The moving delivery cart cracked the store's glass storefront window.
I bought the smaller television because the large screen was too expensive.
The clothing brand will issue store credit if you lose the paper receipt.
The stock boy accidentally mislabeled the price tags on the shoes.
We left the electronic store because the sound system was incredibly loud.
The store manager will call the security team if a customer steals an item.
The cleaning machine scratched the shiny marble floor of the mall entrance.
I did not purchase the milk because the expiration date passed last week.
The automated door will lock automatically if the emergency alarm triggers.
The fashion boutique store wrapped my new silk dress in tissue paper.
I am waiting at terminal two because my morning bus is delayed by rain.
You will miss your regular connection if the commuter train arrives late.
The heavy iron train locomotive crushed a plastic safety cone on the tracks.
I cannot sit on the metal station bench because the sun made it too hot.
The station master will print a paper itinerary if you ask politely.
The long passenger express bus scraped the concrete wall of the terminal.
I bought a high-speed train ticket because the standard regional train takes four hours.
The security gates will close instantly if someone jumps over the ticket turnstile.
The cargo worker dropped my duffel bag into a deep puddle of muddy water.
We stood inside the brick terminal shelter because the platform wind was freezing cold.
